name: io.github.sru-stack9/smriti
description: Self-hosted knowledge store and memory layer for AI agents with knowledge graph and FTS.

tools.name: notes_create
tools.description: Create a note with title, content, auto-extracted wiki-links and tags

tools.name: notes_search
tools.description: Full-text search across all notes using SQLite FTS5

tools.name: notes_list
tools.description: List notes with optional filtering and sorting

tools.name: notes_graph
tools.description: Traverse the knowledge graph — backlinks, forward links, related notes

tools.name: memory_store
tools.description: Store agent memory with namespace and optional TTL

tools.name: memory_retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve memory by key and namespace

tools.name: memory_list
tools.description: List all memories in a namespace
